zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

addresses_finding: F-FN-03 + F-FN-08 (Final Hawkeye P2 — TPM consolidates Stage-6 to one summary step while PERT decomposes to 9 STEP-S6-SLICE-N nodes; deferred from Stage-0 F-006 to Stage-5 detail)
supersedes_section: runs/wealth-com/02_attractor/tpm-flow-ledger.json §steps STEP-S6-CONSTRUCT — by amendment, not replacement; original is preserved for audit trail.
rationale: Per Hawkeye F-FN-03/F-FN-08: TPM-FLOW-LEDGER had STEP-S6-CONSTRUCT as a single summary step ('TB-WC-2026-0501-011 through TB-WC-2026-0501-019') while PERT-WEALTHCOM-001 decomposed Stage-6 to 9 STEP-S6-SLICE-N nodes. The CC-001 Demo MVP narrowing further reduced the surface (Slice-7 Reports deferred; Slice-8 narrowed to 2 mocks). This amendment expands the TPM ledger to per-slice steps matching PERT, restricted to the CC-001 Demo MVP scope, with closure-state reflecting the slice-ralph-sweep verdicts.

expanded_stage_6_steps.closure_rationale: ACCEPTED — 5 RLS attacks blocked at DB; 10 unit + 5 integration tests; refresh-token revocation deferred via WAIVER-T-IT-3

expanded_stage_6_steps.closure_rationale: ACCEPTED — domain model DDD-clean; CHECK constraints + RLS enforced; demo seed validated

expanded_stage_6_steps.closure_rationale: ACCEPTED — ADR-001 enforced by physical separation (no Anthropic SDK in calc-engine pyproject); 24 tests passing; FACT-OBBBA-001 as live constant

expanded_stage_6_steps.closure_rationale: ACCEPTED — 14 tests passing; OBBBA regression alert is most valuable test in run; cent-tolerance patch documented
